productDisplayName: Puma Men Axis XT Black Shoes
description: The Axis XT from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. A great neutral running shoe, it looks great when teamed with casual wear when you're not burning the track.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and easy managementOverlays for added shoe structure Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for added style and structureCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortLace-ups for snug FitMidsolePhylon midsole for strength and lightweight structureOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole for maximum grip and tractionArchTec for greater ease in heel to toe transitionFlex grooves built across the outsole to enhance flexibility
